recommendations.title: The Nice Guys
recommendations.overview: A private eye investigates the apparent suicide of a fading porn star in 1970s Los Angeles and uncovers a conspiracy.

recommendations.title: Play Dirty
recommendations.overview: Expert thief Parker gets a shot at a major heist, but to pull it off he and his team must outsmart a South American dictator, the New York mob, and the world's richest man.

recommendations.title: Kiss Kiss Bang Bang
recommendations.overview: A petty thief posing as an actor is brought to Los Angeles for an unlikely audition and finds himself in the middle of a murder investigation along with his high school dream girl and a detective who's been training him for his upcoming role...

recommendations.title: The Predator
recommendations.overview: When a young boy accidentally triggers the universe's most lethal hunters' return to Earth, only a ragtag crew of ex-soldiers and a disgruntled scientist can prevent the end of the human race.

recommendations.title: Iron Man
recommendations.overview: After being held captive in an Afghan cave, billionaire engineer Tony Stark creates a unique weaponized suit of armor to fight evil.

recommendations.title: Marvel One-Shot: Agent Carter
recommendations.overview: One year after the events of Captain America: The First Avenger, Agent Peggy Carter, a member of the Strategic Scientific Reserve, searches for the mysterious Zodiac.

recommendations.title: Mad Max: Fury Road

recommendations.title: Iron Man 2
recommendations.overview: With the world now aware of his dual life as the armored superhero Iron Man, billionaire inventor Tony Stark faces pressure from the government, the press and the public to share his technology with the military. Unwilling to let go of his invention,

recommendations.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
recommendations.overview: Following the events of Captain America: Civil War, Peter Parker, with the help of his mentor Tony Stark, tries to balance his life as an ordinary high school student in Queens, New York City, with fighting crime as his superhero alter ego Spider-Man

recommendations.title: Avengers: Age of Ultron
